creator: bsdport@ddm.wox.org
text: I just found a github repo for this (https://github.com/DavidGriffith/frotz) by the same author as the sourceforge page listed in the makefile that may have a more update-to-date version. I'll look into seeing if there is anything worth updating to (and if so you may wish to ignore this patch and wait and do the patch+upgrade together).
